title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
